messages.text:
Based on your files, the **"New Drive"** initiative is currently being utilized as an official, experimental sandbox environment for prototyping and testing forward-looking UX/UI patterns and high-risk features. 

By conducting experiments within the New Drive environment, the team aims to isolate experimental work and validate new ideas without being limited by the constraints of the legacy Drive product.

---

### Current Status and Perception
* **Valuable UX Space:** Daniel Giuditta noted that although some team members perceive the New Drive project as being "on the rocks," it remains a highly valuable space for deep UX exploration [📄 Chantel / Daniel - 2026/06/25 15:00 EDT - Notes by Gemini](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1BsEKJ_cBO4Ul1bnHkI1KW8eBaMb5p1P7aynC0bVHh7Q).
* **Strategic Sandbox Adoption:** The team officially agreed to use New Drive as their primary testing ground before rolling out any successful designs or AI features to the broader legacy Google Drive application [📄 Chantel / Daniel - 2026/06/25 15:00 EDT - Notes by Gemini](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1BsEKJ_cBO4Ul1bnHkI1KW8eBaMb5p1P7aynC0bVHh7Q).

### Key Experiments & Features Slated for "New Drive"
The environment is being targeted for several advanced design and AI integrations:

* **Fluid Gemini Side Panels:** Prototyping a "snappable" Gemini chat panel that lives alongside search results. It will feature fluid transitions and adjustable widths (e.g., wider panels for deep topic discovery) depending on user intent [📄 Chantel / Daniel - 2026/06/25 15:00 EDT - Notes by Gemini](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1BsEKJ_cBO4Ul1bnHkI1KW8eBaMb5p1P7aynC0bVHh7Q).
* **Dynamic User Intent Framework:** Testing a shifting, adaptive UI that moves away from static top-of-page placements. The layout will adapt content density based on user intent—such as distinguishing between a quick file search and a more complex research query [📄 Chantel / Daniel - 2026/06/25 15:00 EDT - Notes by Gemini](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1BsEKJ_cBO4Ul1bnHkI1KW8eBaMb5p1P7aynC0bVHh7Q).
* **Advanced Data Visualization:** Incorporating interactive, dynamic charts (similar to those in Sheets) directly within the Drive experience so users can visualize and query data sets effortlessly [📄 Chantel / Daniel - 2026/06/25 15:00 EDT - Notes by Gemini](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1BsEKJ_cBO4Ul1bnHkI1KW8eBaMb5p1P7aynC0bVHh7Q).
* **AI Overview (AIO) Optimizations:** Exploring on-demand AI generation and "snackable" ingress points to prevent UI changes from disrupting users with established muscle memory [📄 Chantel / Daniel - 2026/06/25 15:00 EDT - Notes by Gemini](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1BsEKJ_cBO4Ul1bnHkI1KW8eBaMb5p1P7aynC0bVHh7Q).

### Next Steps
Daniel Giuditta and Chantel Zapata Pray are currently collaborating to share Figma files, rolling presentation decks, and user research results to begin prototyping these advanced Gemini side panels and interface patterns inside the New Drive sandbox [📄 Chantel / Daniel - 2026/06/25 15:00 EDT - Notes by Gemini](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1BsEKJ_cBO4Ul1bnHkI1KW8eBaMb5p1P7aynC0bVHh7Q).

---
